summary: Maeda has flipped decisively bullish in his latest video, explicitly declaring 'The Bottom Is In' and predicting higher Bitcoin prices after wrapping up his bearish positions.
narrative: His most recent analysis argues that the crypto market is currently bottoming, suggesting STRC acts as marginal buying leverage to propel BTC upward while critiquing standard 4-year cycle theories. This marks a significant shift from his previous strategy of shorting Ethereum for substantial profits throughout late 2025, as he now looks for long opportunities.

tweets.text: 🎬 Closed my ETH Short. What’s Next for Crypto?
🎬 Why I’m Short $1.5M of ETH (It’s So Over)
